hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'wrangler deploy'; then echo '⚠️  After deploying the worker, update WORKER_URL in frontend/index.html if the worker URL changed.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'oauth'; then echo '✓ OAuth route changed. Reminder: LinkedIn has no refresh token — users re-auth every 60 days. KV state TTL is 5 min.'; fi
